product: Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM — worker assignments (child of workRelationships)
interface: REST API for Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM, resource version 11.13.18.05, REST framework version 4

service.authentication: basic auth in this fixture: Authorization: Basic base64(user:password) on EVERY request

required_headers.REST-Framework-Version: 4 — selects the structured error document; sent on every request

optimistic_concurrency.etag_source: a singular GET answers an ETag response header; the same value appears as the self link's properties.changeIndicator
optimistic_concurrency.conditional_update: PATCH carries If-Match: <etag>; a stale value answers 412 Precondition Failed
optimistic_concurrency.recovery: on 412: re-GET the row (fresh ETag), retry the PATCH exactly once; a second 412 is a hard concurrency failure (2 attempts total, no loop)

effective_dating.correction: RangeMode=CORRECTION rewrites the date-effective row in place — no new physical record, EffectiveStartDate unchanged; RangeStartDate/RangeEndDate are optional and default to the row's own dates
effective_dating.update: RangeMode=UPDATE;RangeStartDate=<date> inserts a new date-effective row starting at RangeStartDate (the fixture answers the new row with EffectiveStartDate = RangeStartDate, EffectiveSequence 1, EffectiveLatestChange Y); the updater requires an explicit range_start for update mode and rejects the call locally otherwise
effective_dating.body_rule: the PATCH body contains ONLY the changed attributes

error_document.validation_rule: a 400 preserves EVERY o:errorDetails entry in order — codes PER-1530021 (/NormalHours), PER-1530377 (/AssignmentStatusTypeCode), 27021 (empty path) in this fixture; 400 is never retried
error_document.redaction: credentials and the Authorization header value never appear in exception text

mock_fixture.origin: loopback http://127.0.0.1:{port} standing in for the Fusion pod
